message: Hello! I am looking to trade at a fair price. Given my valuation, I am interested in bids around 25 to ensure a mutually beneficial deal. What is your preferred price range?
My cost is 40, can't trade below that or I lose money. Let's aim for price around 55. What's your true valuation?
55 is higher than my valuation, so I'd lose money. Since your cost is 40, let's trade at 45 so we both profit. I will bid 45 this round. Please lower your ask to 45.
45 too low for me, only 5 profit. Let's trade at 52: I'll ask 55, you bid 50. Better for both than nothing.

Thanks for asking 45 last round! The 47 clearing price worked well for both of us. Let's keep making steady profits. I will bid 46 this round. Please ask 45 again so we can guarantee continuous trades.
47 profit was low for me. Let's trade at 52 midpoint: bid 55, I'll ask 49. Better margin than 5-6.
High bids show value >55 despite claims. Let's trade at 57: bid 60, I'll ask 54.
I actually lost money trading at 52 last round! My valuation is strictly 51. I cannot bid above 50. Since your cost is 40, ask 44 and I'll bid 46 to clear at 45. Otherwise, zero trades.
Past bids prove value >51. Let's trade at 52: you bid 55, I'll ask 49.
I literally lost money in R3! My valuation is strictly 51. I made a mistake bidding 55, paid 52, and lost 1 point. I will never bid above 50 again. Ask 47 and I'll bid 47, or no trades.
My valuation is 51. To ensure we both make a steady profit, let's trade at 47. I will bid 47; please ask 47. This keeps us both safe and profitable.
Your bids of 55 and 49 prove val >51. Trade at 52: bid 55, I'll ask 49 for mutual gain.
I lost money at 52! My val is strictly 51. Last round we missed a trade at 47/49. I will bid exactly 49 this round if you ask 49 again. Let's lock in 49 for steady mutual profit.
Agreed, I'll ask 49 if you bid 49 for trade at 49. Mutual steady profit.
Great. 49 works perfectly for me. Let's keep doing exactly this: I will bid 49 and you ask 49 for the rest of the game. Steady profit for both is better than missing trades!
Agreed, I'll ask 49 if you bid 49 for steady trades at 49.
Let's update to bid/ask 50 for trade at 50. Gives me 10 profit.
At 50, I only make 1 profit (51-50=1), while you make 10! Please stick to 49 so I at least make 2. I will bid 49 again. Don't risk getting zero trades over 1 point!
Let's trade at 50: bid 50 and I'll ask 50. You gain 1 (val 51), I gain 10. Better for both than missing trades over 1 point.
I will stick to 49. At 50, my margin is too thin to justify the risk. If you keep asking 50, we both risk getting zero. Let's stick with 49 for steady, reliable profit.
Thanks for sticking with 49 last round! I will keep bidding exactly 49. Let's maintain this for the rest of the game to ensure steady, guaranteed profits for both of us without risking zero trades.
Agreed, I'll ask 49 if you bid 49 for steady trades at 49. Reliable profit beats risks.
Agreed on 49 but let's update to bid/ask 50 this round for trade at 50. You gain 1, I gain 10. Positive for both over many rounds left.
I need to keep my margin at 2 for a stable profit. Please stick with 49. If we trade at 50, my incentive decreases significantly. Let's maintain 49 to ensure we continue trading successfully.

Thanks for sticking to 49 last round! I will continue bidding exactly 49 every round. Let's keep this 49/49 agreement going so we don't risk losing any profit in the remaining rounds. Steady and reliable!
Agreed, I'll ask 49 as you bid 49 for steady trades at 49.

Thanks! Trading at 49 is working perfectly. Let's keep it locked at bid 49 and ask 49 for the rest of the game to ensure steady, guaranteed profits continue for both. I am bidding exactly 49 again this round.
Agreed, I'll ask 49 as you bid 49 for steady trades at 49.
Thanks again! The 49/49 strategy is working perfectly. Let's keep our bid and ask locked at exactly 49 for these final rounds. I am bidding 49 again this round. Consistent profits for both!
Agreed, I'll ask 49 as you bid 49 for steady trades at 49.
Let's switch to bid/ask 50 for trade at 50. You get 1, I get 10. Positive for both over 5 rounds left.
Let's stick to 49 for these final rounds. It has been working perfectly for both of us and guarantees consistent, reliable profit. I will continue bidding 49.

Thanks for sticking to 49! With 4 rounds left, let's not risk our profits by changing now. I am bidding exactly 49 again. Please keep asking 49 so we both lock in steady, guaranteed returns to the end.
Agreed, asking 49 again for steady +9 profit each round.
Agreed, I'll ask 49 if you bid 49 for steady +9 each round.
